title: [HW] Implement `hw.name` to suggest wire names
body:
```mlir
hw.module @test (%a: i32) -> (%x: i32, %y: i32) {
  %0 = comb.or %a, %a : i32
  hw.name "testname" %0 : i32    // hw.name would have side effects.
  hw.output %0, %0 : i32, i32
}
```

[Discussed in forum](https://llvm.discourse.group/t/systemverilog-wire-names/4225). I switched "probe" to "name" since "probe" implies some sort of permanence (i.e. must expose a wire of this name which carries the same value as this Value) whereas "name" doesn't.

Would be used instead of the `name` attribute in SV emission.
